_comment: Live BannerHub Explore manifest. Uploaded as the 'bh_explore.json' asset on each STABLE release; the app fetches releases/latest/download/bh_explore.json, caches it, and falls back to the in-APK bundled copy offline. Edit this file (esp. the hero 'body' = What's New) when cutting a stable. Card actions: gog | url | article | soon. Rail types: hero | news | games | shortcuts. 'version'/'build' = the LATEST published version (stamped by stamp_version.py); the app compares it against the installed bh_version.json to show an update banner.

cards.label: Features & What's New
cards.subtitle: Everything BannerHub adds to GameHub
cards.body:
WHAT'S NEW IN v1.3.0-608
• In-game voice calls (1:1 and party)
• Steam chat overlay v2

EVERYTHING WE'VE ADDED
• No-login launch — straight to your library, no account needed
• Offline play for imported PC games (works in airplane mode)
• PC-accurate controller vibration & rumble, with per-game settings
• GOG sign-in, library & in-app install
• In-game Steam friends, chat & voice-call overlay (no root)
• BannerHub Explore homepage + in-app update check
• In-game performance overlay (root)
• Recording-compatible audio toggle
• Strict per-game settings store
• PC Game Settings & Game ID menu rows
• BannerHub component catalog — drivers, DXVK, VKD3D, translators
• Custom BannerHub branding & app icon
• Muted UI click sounds

Tap below to view the project on GitHub.
